name: Raider Camp
uniques: +10% Defense for units on this tile

name: Labor Outpost
uniques: +3 Production from Slave Laborers working this tile

name: Enforcer Watchtower

name: Reclamation Zone
uniques: +20% yield on all tiles in this city
